additional_metadata.host_organizer: Mike Planting, Senior Data Engineer, Clickfunnels.com
additional_metadata.note: First-ever Boise dbt Meetup, hosted online, aimed at growing the dbt community across Idaho.

events.agenda: Inaugural Boise dbt Meetup covering key dbt features including data lineage, source freshness, data quality, templated data loading patterns, CI/CD, and model documentation.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, aiming to grow the dbt user community in the Boise area and statewide in Idaho.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 2, 2022 · 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM CEST

Online event

Boise dbt Meetup (first edition, online)

Overview of key dbt features and how it can accelerate Data Warehouse development and DataOps initiatives, covering data lineage, source freshness, data quality/testing, templated data loading patterns, CI/CD, and dynamically generated model documentation.

Host: Mike Planting, Senior Data Engineer, Clickfunnels.com

talks.description: An overview of key dbt features that accelerate data warehouse development and DataOps initiatives, covering data lineage, source freshness, data quality/testing, templated loading patterns, CI/CD, and auto-generated documentation.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 12:05 - Overview of key dbt features and how it can accelerate your Data Warehouse development and DataOps initiatives with Mike Planting
talks.title: Overview of key dbt features and how it can accelerate your Data Warehouse development and DataOps initiatives

additional_metadata.host_organizer: Mike Planting, Senior Data Engineer, Clickfunnels.com

events.agenda: Second Boise dbt Meetup covering creating Snowflake Snowpipes and External Tables via dbt, plus dbt testing and data quality features.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Aug 11, 2022 · 8:00 PM to 10:00 PM CEST

Online event

Boise dbt Meetup (online)

Agenda:
12:05 - Mike Planting - Leveraging dbt to create Snowflake Snowpipes and External Tables over AWS S3 files
12:30 - Taylor Petersen - dbt Data Quality Testing - 4 types of generics test and when to use singular tests

talks.description: An overview of dbt's generic and singular data quality tests, covering the four generic test types and when to use singular tests instead.
